name: chr9p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 9 p-arm pericentric flank (9p11.1-9p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr9 centromere. Complementary to the much larger 9q12 HSat3 block. Alpha-satellite (D9Z1), pericentromeric SDs, HSat patches. Site of inv(9)(p11q13) breakpoint. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat3 patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline; breakpoint of common inv(9)(p11q13) polymorphism.
